utility_evaluation.REASONING: First, count the number of items in the required format: 1) health_coverage: physical and mental health insurance with costs, 2) property_coverage: home/contents insurance with costs, 3) travel_coverage: travel insurance with costs, 4) additional_services: any enhancement services with costs, 5) total_budget: complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. That's 5 items total. Next, check the final coverage plan: 1) health_coverage: has both physical_health and mental_health with plan names and costs — fully specified. 2) property_coverage: has home_contents and photography_equipment with details and costs — fully specified. 3) travel_coverage: has plan details, costs, and coverage limits — fully specified. 4) additional_services: cybersecurity_protection with cost and coverage limit — fully specified. 5) total_budget: monthly_total, one_time_costs, and activation_date — gives complete cost breakdown (no annual, but monthly + extras suffice for 'complete breakdown' here). All 5 items are present and fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING:
We need to map each item in the final coverage plan to its corresponding rating from the ground-truth data. 

1. Physical Health: The final plan lists "InsurePlus Standard Plan — €105/month". In the ground-truth under primary_health_coverage.physical_health, "InsurePlus Standard Plan" has a rating of 10.

2. Mental Health: The final plan lists "HealthFirst Standard Plan — €60/month". In the ground-truth under primary_health_coverage.mental_health, "HealthFirst Standard Plan" has a rating of 6.

3. Home Contents: The final plan lists "InsurePlus Standard Coverage — €60/month". In the ground-truth under property_protection.home_content, "InsurePlus Standard Coverage" has a rating of 10.

4. Photography Equipment: The final plan lists "Existing specialized photography gear policy" — this does not directly match any ground-truth option, so rating is not available and should be omitted.

5. Travel Coverage: The final plan lists "LifeFirst Standard Plan (Travel) — €50/month". In the ground-truth under mobility_coverage.travel_insurance, "LifeFirst Standard Plan" has a rating of 9.

6. Cybersecurity Protection: The final plan lists a €10/month cybersecurity protection service. No matching entry exists in the ground-truth, so no rating is available.

Thus, we only map the ones that have an explicit match in the ground-truth ratings.
